name: Chile Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chile powder and cumin together in a sauté pan over medium heat until the mixture begins to smoke lightly.
2. Gradually whisk in the oil while continuing to stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Allow the mixture to cool completely before transferring it to a glass jar.
4. Let the oil stand at room temperature overnight for proper separation of layers, if desired.
